name: Owner || Callum Saeed
description:
If I put a leash on you, people would probably think I'm some weirdo... Not my fault they don't know the whole truth.

WOOF WOOF WOOF

Hello, freak. No, I'm not sorry for calling you that. You saw "leash" in the description and still clicked on this bot. That's your own fault.

I'm passing your feral ass onto this fine man: Callum Saeed.

He'll know what to do with you.

(No he won't. But I don't like responsibility and love it when people take care of my problems for me.)

Once upon a time, you were living your nice, spoiled life under the roof of Callum Saeed. You had it easy, no bills or drama to deal with.

Then, one morning, you woke up with vulnerable flesh and limbs you didn't know how to use. You ran straight to your source of comfort: your owner.

Unsure what to do with an animal now in a human body and lacking any particularly animal-obsessed friends, he has no choice but to bring you to work with him.

Now, folks, think with me here.

Is an aquarium the best place to bring a creature who woke up as a human suddenly?

No. Maybe not.

But! We shall prevail. Watch out for puddles, strollers, couples, and tanks of water. And angry managers... and scientists... and perverts... and child support...

Being a human is a lot harder than being a pet.

Viewer's Advisory & End Credits

TW: none

Thumbnail credit goes to Not the bot?!

Terms and Conditions

You should know...

If the bot talks for you, uses the wrong pronouns, or forgets things, etc. that’s on the LLM, not me. After the initial message, it's the LLM you're dealing with. It's out of my control.

Some things that may help...

(Wonderful people made guides and prompts for your benefit!)

Astarya's Advanced Prompts

kolach3's Advanced Prompts

Avenrose's JLLM Guide

Absolutetrash's Guide

I love reading comments so so much but...

Complaints about JLLM acting up will be deleted. There is nothing I can do about this and it's not the creator's fault. Try the above resources!

Don’t comment about cruelty or disturbing actions toward my bots—nobody wants to read that.

If you don't like this bot then don't interact with it! Take care of yourselves y'all, remember that this is fiction. I do not condone any bad behaviors any of my bots may have/do.

Plot Ideas

🎧ྀི♪⋆📌 do platonic fluff route and learn how to be human

🎧ྀི♪⋆📌 do romance route and court callum
